message:
fix(gateway): harden Slack notification with header truncation and URL masking

Improves robustness and security of Slack webhook notifications:

- Add SLACK_HEADER_MAX_LENGTH (150) constant per Slack Block Kit limits
- Add WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT_MS (10s) default timeout for external calls
- Add truncateText() helper with ellipsis for overflow
- Add maskUrlForLogging() to hide sensitive paths in logs
- Apply truncation to header text before sending to Slack API

Prevents Slack API errors from overly long titles and improves
log hygiene by not exposing full webhook URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
